name: Feature request

title: '[FEATURE] '

---

## Description
A clear description of what you want to add or improve.

## Use Case
Why would this be useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
How should it work?

## Alternatives
Are there other ways to solve this?

## Additional Context
Any other information?
